parameters.jsCode:
const results = ($input.first().json.businesses || []).filter(b => !b.is_closed).map(b => ({
  businessName: b.name || '',
  address: b.location?.address1 || '',
  city: b.location?.city || '',
  state: b.location?.state || '',
  zip: b.location?.zip_code || '',
  phone: b.phone || b.display_phone || '',
  website: b.url || '',
  rating: b.rating || 0,
  reviewCount: b.review_count || 0,
  yelpId: b.id || '',
  source: 'Yelp'
}));
return results;
